title: Business Logic
description: Primary domain logic and application features

title: Home Page Title
description: The home page should have text BELOW the header that says "Hello, World!"

tests.name: test_home_page_title_below_header
tests.title: Verify 'Hello, World!' text is present and positioned below the header.
tests.given: The src/App.tsx file exists and contains the main application structure.
tests.then: The text "Hello, World!" is present and its position in the file content

title: Implement Home Page Title
description: The home page shall display the text "Hello, World!" positioned directly below the main application header.

tests.name: test_home_page_hello_world_text_positioning
tests.title: Verify "Hello, World!" text is displayed directly below the main application header.
tests.given: The React application's App component definition in `src/App.tsx`.
tests.when: The content of `src/App.tsx` is read and inspected for specific JSX structure.
tests.then: The string "Hello, World!" is found within a `div` element that immediately

title: Color
description: The header of the page should be solid dark blue

title: Implement Color
description: The header of the page should be solid dark blue

tests.name: test_app_tsx_css_import_fixed
tests.title: Verify App.tsx imports App.css instead of index.css.
tests.when: Examining the import statements in src/App.tsx
tests.then: The file imports './App.css' and does not import './index.css'

tests.name: test_app_tsx_contains_header_element
tests.title: Verify that the App component includes a header element with the correct class.
tests.given: The src/App.tsx file exists and its CSS import is correct
tests.when: Examining the JSX structure within the App component's return statement
tests.then: A '<header className="app-header">' element is present, wrapped in a fragment, and contains a title.

tests.name: test_app_css_contains_header_styles
tests.title: Verify that src/App.css defines the styles for the app header.

title: Alignment
description: The header shall be at the very top of the page and stretch the whole width of the screen

title: Position Header at Top Edge
description: Apply CSS to the header element to ensure it is rendered flush with the top edge of the browser viewport. This typically involves using `position: fixed` (or `sticky`) with `top: 0`, and resetting default `margin` on `body` and `html` elements.

tests.name: test_app_css_header_position_fixed
tests.title: Verify app header uses position: fixed.
tests.given: The src/App.css file exists and contains .app-header styles

tests.name: test_app_css_header_top_edge
tests.title: Verify app header is positioned at top: 0.
tests.given: The src/App.css file exists and contains .app-header styles

tests.name: test_app_css_header_left_edge
tests.title: Verify app header is positioned at left: 0.
tests.given: The src/App.css file exists and contains .app-header styles

tests.name: test_app_css_header_full_width
tests.title: Verify app header spans full width.
tests.given: The src/App.css file exists and contains .app-header styles

tests.name: test_app_css_header_z_index
tests.title: Verify app header has high z-index.
tests.given: The src/App.css file exists and contains .app-header styles

tests.name: test_app_css_header_margin_bottom_removed
tests.title: Verify margin-bottom is removed from fixed header.
tests.given: The src/App.css file exists and contains .app-header styles
tests.then: The .app-header style block does not contain 'margin-bottom: 2rem;'

tests.name: test_index_css_html_body_margin_padding_reset
tests.title: Verify html, body margin and padding are reset.
tests.then: The file contains 'html, body { margin: 0; padding: 0; }'

tests.name: test_index_css_body_padding_top
tests.title: Verify body has padding-top for fixed header clearance.
tests.given: The src/index.css file exists and contains body styles

tests.name: test_index_css_body_flex_properties_removed
tests.title: Verify body flexbox centering properties are removed.
tests.given: The src/index.css file exists and contains body styles
tests.then: The body style block does not contain 'display: flex;' or 'place-items: center;'

tests.name: test_index_css_root_text_align_removed
tests.title: Verify redundant text-align: center is removed from #root in index.css.
tests.given: The src/index.css file exists and contains #root styles
tests.then: The #root style block does not contain 'text-align: center;'

title: Implement Full Viewport Width
description: Apply CSS to the header element to ensure it occupies 100% of the browser viewport's width. This is commonly achieved by setting `width: 100%` or `width: 100vw`, and resetting `margin` and `padding` on `body` and `html` to prevent horizontal scrollbars or gaps.

tests.name: test_html_body_reset_in_index_css
tests.title: Verify html and body elements have margin, padding, and box-sizing reset.
tests.then: The file contains `html, body { margin: 0; padding: 0; box-sizing: border-box; }`

tests.name: test_body_flex_properties_removed_in_index_css
tests.title: Verify display: flex, place-items: center, and min-width are removed from body in index.css.
tests.then: The 'body' selector does not contain `display: flex`, `place-items: center`, or `min-width` declarations

tests.name: test_app_header_full_viewport_width_css
tests.title: Verify .app-header has correct CSS for full viewport width.

title: Title text is in line with header
description:
### Steps to Reproduce
1. Go to Home page

### Expected Behavior
title text should be below the header

### Actual Behavior
title is inline with the header

tests.name: test_bug_3963_header_content_position_fix
tests.title: Verify content is positioned below the fixed header by checking CSS cascade.
tests.given: The application's CSS files are loaded.
tests.when: Inspecting 'src/index.css' for body padding rules and their order.
